name: okta_user_mfa_reset
description: A user reset their own MFA factor. Panther's UDM event_type MFA_RESET resolves (via the Okta data model) to a factor deactivate/suspend whose outcome reason starts with 'User reset'.

validation.notes: Factor name in the Panther title comes from okta.outcome.reason (e.g. 'User reset FIDO_WEBAUTHN factor'), surfaced here as a breakdown.
